transcript.text:
[Tzuyang's Diary]
[Let's cook some food for her]
[Eating after physical labor is the best]
[About 2kgs of food]
It's a country-side home
[Welcome to our house!]
[Where are we at today?]
Hello everyone
I'm at Jochiwon today
Peaches are in season (June~August)
So I'm here for some peaches
And some food they prepared for me
Let's go get some work done
There's a lot
Hello
Are these all ripe?

Yes, these peaches ripe from June to October So we harvest them depending on how ripe they are
If you pick out from 1 tree for 10 days
Then you can go to the next tree for the next 10 days
The peaches will be the same but all 10 days apart
-Do you like peaches? -I love them
Hard peach or soft peach?
I like both
[Let's do some work]
[A must-have country hat]
[Gloves too]
Right, I get allergic reactions on my hands
How do you do it?
Get it with this
Grab and pull
[Your turn]
We'll feed you if you do a good job

Prioritize the big ones that are at the top
[Will she be able to do it?]
I did it
[Congrats on your first peach]
[Now all together]
[Small talks]
[She wants to do better than the kids]
This is fun
I'm a YouTube fanatic
Oh hello!
I'm a huge fan
Nice to meet you
[The inside]
So sweet
Do you want to try moving these to the car?
Drop it if you think it'll fall over

She's a good worker
You deserve a big meal
Aren't you tired? It's getting really hot
That's the worst part of this business We work during the hottest times
And these can get your body very itchy and uncomfortable
I started a YouTube channel too
It's a struggle to gain subscribers
Since the contents are farm-related It's not too popular
Advertise your channel
Hello
I'm Han Heung Soo, a farmer that has a YouTuber channel called "Uncle Tom's Fruit Farm"
Subscribe and like, please Thank you
As for peaches, their skins are thin and they can easily get watery
So you are only able to get them locally
A lot of climate changes are needed for them to be this delicious
So these peaches are the best of the best

Enjoy our country's peaches to wash away the Summer heat
[Clap clap]
[Show lots of love and support for Korea's peaches!]
Show us a lot of love
Be more natural
[Less natural]
[She's really getting into it]
[Finished]
[It's time to eat!]
The smell of stir-fried pork
A country-side home
[She's already preparing the food]
She used to work at a famous cooking company
20 years ago
[No wonder it looked scrumptious]
[With homemade side dishes]

[Love from the grandmother too]
She's eating all of this?
That?
All of that?
Thank you
I'm being treated as a queen
I feel bad
Thank you
It's good that you're eating a lot
Thank you so much for the food
Enjoy your meal
Thank you
This is a lot
[How many servings is this...?]
I picked out some peaches today
I'm receiving way more than I worked

Is everyone else eating too?
Yes, enjoy your food
Thank you for the food
This is 2kgs of meat
Should weigh more with the veggies
Bon appetit
[Mukbang starts now!]
Stir-fried pork made by the chef/nutritionist
So good
It's really good, but it tastes even better maybe because I worked
Happiness in my mouth
[Wow, she's good at eating]
[She's just getting started]
So good
Rice looks so good too
Put a piece on top

Green onion
-The food tastes amazing -Thank you
-Do you really like it? -Yes, I love it
-Enjoy -Thank you
Do you have more?
-2 times that amount -Really? That's a relief
It's because I thought she gave me everything
This is the real country perilla leaf
The rice is incredible What kind of rice do they use?
I would never get tired of this sauce
It's full of flavor and delicious
It's seasoned perfectly Maybe because it was prepared by a nutritionist
Thank you
I can do it myself
Just eat
Thank you

Eat
-Did you pick peaches? -Yes I did
-Tiring, right? -It was very hot
-Eat a lot -Thank you
[Dried baby shrimp]
I can work at the fruit farm every day if they give me this much food after
I came here because July 28th is Peach Day
I had it earlier and it was so tasty
Sweet and soft
Have a taste this Summer
Eating after labor is the best
I'm already done with 1 bowl of rice
This calls for more rice
It's been a while since I've seen this table
Koi fish and peacock
[She's cutting up some peaches]

What? Peaches? Thank you!
Eat slowly
[Where are you going?]
[Into the kitchen]
[More rice]
She's skinny
Eat a lot and stay healthy
Thank you
White peach and nectarine
Let's try
These are so soft
White peach
I love the smell it gives out
I love peaches
I want to buy some
So yummy

Perfect texture and sweetness
I had the kimchi earlier and it was delicious
It feels like I'm at my grandma's
I was raised by my grandmother in a home like this
And I ate a lot
She fed me endlessly
A meal followed up by snacks
And another meal after snacks
I think that's what made the person I am today
I wouldn't be here without my grandmother
How is it?
It's so good!
That would feed my entire family
But you're devouring it
Some peaches too
You're pretty

I told my friend that I would get him your autograph
He's your subscriber
But it's just a piece of paper
So we fought
Bye now
Tastes great with perilla leaf
I never knew that these types of peaches are only from Korea
Do other countries have peaches?
Oh, peach
They do
Let's show love for our domestic fruits
I hope the farmers prosper because they work so hard in the heat
Do you know what I had to go through for this?
[Rant goes on...]
[Long story short, let's eat some peaches]
A family of 4 eats 1 pack of that

She's eating 3 packs, so that's 12~15 servings
And I'm a good cook
She really ate everything
It was so good
Let me get you more
More rice?
[Back to the kitchen]
Eating more after all that?
Eat a lot Why only that much?
I scooped a little
[Scrape everything!]
-We look funny right now, right? -No, not at all
[They're adorable]
[Is she serious?]
[2kgs of stir-fried pork, 3 bowls of rice, peaches]
[Yay]

I had a great meal
Thank you for enjoying it
[There's more]
[Dessert!]
This is that homemade fruit syrup
So good
Eat more after that
[A grandma's heart to feed the little ones]
They're extremely soft
Almost like canned fruits
But way more delicious
Today, I had the stir-fried pork and it was very delicious
And the peaches tasted even better maybe because I harvested them myself
Show lots of love and support for Korea's peaches
Thanks everyone
[Subtitles by Anthony Hyun Choi] [antchoi91@gmail.com]
